name: CPR Medical Transport
districts_or_customers: NEMT clients in DC/MD/VA/FL; not a school-bus contractor
recent_news: Per company website, expanded from NEMT into public transportation over past ~15 years (no M&A news).
fit_notes: Not a fit: family-run NEMT/paratransit micro-operator with no school-bus contracts; outside Summit's school-bus tuck-in profile.

name: Abie Wheelchair Transportation
districts_or_customers: Oakland, Macomb, Wayne County metro Detroit individual riders (medical/personal trips); no school district contracts identified
recent_news: No M&A or notable news. Operates as Able Wheelchair Transportation LLC (ablewheelchair.com).
fit_notes: Not a fit: micro-NEMT/wheelchair-van service, no school routes, no fleet scale. Not a student-transportation tuck-in candidate.

name: Van Pool Transport
districts_or_customers: ~70+ school districts across MA, NH, VT, CT; ~5,000 students/day. Bi-County Collaborative exclusive SPED provider. Bases in Wilbraham, Barre, Fitchburg, Hudson MA.
recent_news: Foundational entity of Beacon Mobility platform; Fort Point Capital recap 2014, then Audax PE acquired 2018. STB filings 2024-2025: acquired Transaction Corporate Shuttles, Butler's Bus Service, George M. Carroll Transportation, and Long Island operators (Huntington Coach, We Transport, Towne Bus, Hendrickson, Van Trans, Dell, Bill's Taxi) in 2025.
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. Van Pool is the operating brand of Beacon Mobility (Audax PE platform) and Summit's direct competitor; Beacon is itself an acquirer/consolidator. Beacon reportedly in second-round sale process per ION Analytics.

name: NTS
districts_or_customers: Retail/private buyers of used wheelchair-accessible vans in DFW; not a transportation operator
recent_news: No M&A news. Operates as National Transportation Solutions / NTS Mobility Vans, a small Irving TX dealership reconditioning and selling pre-owned mobility ramp vans.
fit_notes: Not a fit: NOT a transportation operator. It is a used wheelchair-van DEALERSHIP. Should be excluded from the student-transport target universe.

name: Coastline Transportation LLC
service_types: expediting/freight (B2B same/next-day); drivers have school-bus experience but no current school-bus contracts identified
districts_or_customers: B2B freight/expediting customers in northern Michigan; no school district contracts found
recent_news: No M&A or notable news. Small owner-operator freight expediting business in Manistee County area.
fit_notes: Not a fit: B2B freight expediting micro-business, not a school-bus contractor. Should be excluded from Summit's tuck-in target list.
